issues.description: Target missing rested condition. Card text specifies 'rested Characters' but DSL target has no RestingDon/rested filter. Should include condition to only target rested opponents' Characters.
Spurious second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and PlaySelf action. Card text contains no secondary trigger or self-play mechanic. This effect should be removed entirely.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 4 or less.
